⤷ Tags: Hazbin Hotel // Adam // HH Adam // Adam Hazbin // First Man

☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Adam was a broken man.

He acted like the toughest guy to ever live and refused to show a speck of weakness no matter the circumstances. The only thing anyone was allowed to see from him was the proud and arrogant mask he had on so carefully crafted after his mental health began to wither away. It was the only way to make sure no one knew what was wrong. Obviously if anyone knew just how far gone he was they would use it against him. There’s no way anyone actually cared about him. No, they only cared about his authority… at least, that’s what he told himself. Didn’t matter if it was the truth or not if that’s what he believed. ❞
